insights.narrative:
Scanned 83 words across 2 bullets in 4 sections. The resume reads as a ~21-second skim — recruiters typically allocate 6–15 seconds, so the top third has to carry the strongest signals on its own.

On the rubric that matters most, quantification sits at 100% (industry benchmark is 60%+) and action-verb usage at 100% (target 70%+). Weak phrasings detected: 0, buzzwords: 0. This is competitive territory — focus refinement on the specifics, not the basics.
